confirmation.subject: Account Confirmation
confirmation.thank-you: Thank you for registering. To complete your registration, please click the button below:
confirmation.link: Or copy and paste this link into your browser:
confirmation.ignore: If you did not register, please ignore this email. The link will expire in {time}.

password-reset.subject: Password Reset
password-reset.info: We received a request to reset your password. Click the button below to create a new one:
password-reset.link: Or copy and paste this link into your browser:
password-reset.ignore: If you did not request a password reset, please ignore this email. The link will expire in {time}.

swarm.subject: Swarm handling
swarm.info: A bee swarm was found near your apiary.
swarm.swarm-navigate: You can navigate to the swarm using the following links:
